description.en: Boosts potency of [P. ATK Up] and [M. ATK Up] buffs given to Attackers by 5 / 10 / 15 / 30 / 50%

description.jp: 得意属性が風属性かつアタッカーへ与えるダメージ強化の効果量8 / 15 / 23 / 45 / 75%アップ

description.en: Boosts potency of [Damage Dealt Up] buffs given to Wind Attackers by 8 / 15 / 23 / 45 / 75%

description.jp: 得意属性が打属性かつアタッカーへ与えるダメージ強化の効果量8 / 15 / 23 / 45 / 75%アップ
description.zh: 賦予打屬性攻擊者的傷害強化效果量提升8 / 15 / 23 / 45 / 75%
description.en: Boosts potency of [Damage Dealt Up] buffs given to Strike Attackers by 8 / 15 / 23 / 45 / 75%
